class.name: UDSServer
class.description: A Unix Domain Socket (UDS) server. Listens to connections on a socket path and returns a [StreamPeerUDS] when it gets an incoming connection. Unix Domain Sockets provide inter-process communication on the same machine using the filesystem namespace. [b]Note:[/b] Unix Domain Sockets are only available on Unix-like systems (Linux, macOS, etc.) and are not supported on Windows.

method.name: is_connection_available
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a connection is available for taking.

method.name: is_listening
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the server is currently listening for connections.

method.name: listen
method.description: Listen on the socket at [param path]. The socket file will be created at the specified path. [b]Note:[/b] The socket file must not already exist at the specified path. You may need to remove any existing socket file before calling this method.

method.name: take_connection
method.description: If a connection is available, returns a StreamPeerUDS with the connection.
